children.heading: Board of Directors
children.label: 1 Board of Directors
children.text: The term “Board of Directors” means the Board of Directors of the Corporation.

children.heading: Corporation
children.label: 2 Corporation
children.text: The term “Corporation” means the Farm Credit System Insurance Corporation established in .section 2277a–1 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: on or before , on behalf of any System bank; andJanuary 5, 1989

children.label: B
children.text: after such date, which, when issued, is issued on behalf of any insured System bank.

children.heading: Insured System bank
children.label: 4 Insured System bank
children.text: The term “insured System bank” means any System bank whose participation in notes, bonds, debentures, and other obligations issued under subsection (c) or (d) of is insured under this part.section 2153 of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 5 State
children.text: The term “State” means any of the 50 States, the District of Columbia, any Territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, or the Virgin Islands.
